title: Faculty Development Program/ Staff Development Program / Individual Development Program
content: 2-8th June, 2023 The Journey to Self – Exploration, Research & innovation and Peace Education Program is an innovative video-based workshop that helps participants to discover their own inner strength and personal peace. The program encourages participants to reach their own understanding. The program curriculum consists of a series of 10 themes, which correspond to the inner resources explored across the workshops. Each workshop consists of video segments, times for reflection and accompanying reading material. There is a workbook for each participant. There is no test, as the program is about individual self-discovery — something that is unique for each person. Through reflection, discussion and activities, participants develops enhanced personal awareness. Galgotias University's School of Liberal Education organized a workshop on "Self-Exploration, Research, and Innovation" under the "Peace Education Program" on Friday. The program was organized in collaboration with the Prem Rawat Foundation. The Workshop commenced at C Block, Old Auditorium in Galgotias University with an enthusiastic and hopeful atmosphere. The workshop aimed to emphasize the importance of peace in today's fast-paced and constantly changing world. The event sought to provide participants with a moment of self-indulgence and an opportunity to focus on their mental and emotional well-being.
